metadata.title: Energy/power leg - the AI+defense power bottleneck, nuclear/SMR PPAs, turbine wall, Russia enrichment chokepoint
metadata.provenance: Web-verified (IEA Energy & AI; US DOE; PJM auction releases; Utility Dive/GE Vernova; Centrus 8-Ks; DOE/NRC on Russian uranium ban). GW/kg-HALEU figures illustrative-but-grounded.

pjm_capacity_auction.note: hit cap 3 auctions running ($329->$333.44); ~$9.3B of the increase data-center-driven

nuclear_smr_deals.source: Constellation / Three Mile Island Unit 1 restart

nuclear_smr_deals.term: first corp SMR fleet deal; 50MW by 2030

gas_turbines.fact: GE Vernova ~80 GW backlog into 2029; heavy-duty lead ~3yr, CCGT 5-7yr; ~80GW orders vs ~30GW/yr capacity; Crusoe ordered 19 turbines (behind-the-meter gas).

haleu_enrichment_chokepoint.fact: Russia ~44% of global enrichment; ~35% of US imports; 27% of US enriched-uranium demand (2023). HALEU for SMRs was ~100% Russia. Prohibiting Russian Uranium Imports Act (May 2024, eff Aug 11 2024) with waivers to 2027; Russia retaliated with export curbs. Domestic Centrus ~900 kg/yr HALEU (Piketon OH). Kazatomprom ~38-40% of mining. Midstream (conversion+enrichment) is the real chokepoint.

proven_results.power_adequacy: Z3 P1 UNSAT: new firm power supply < AI demand every year through 2028 (2026: 18 vs 25 GW; 2028: 34 vs 80 GW - gap widens). Earliest balanced year >2028.
proven_results.haleu_chokepoint: Z3 P2 UNSAT: domestic HALEU short of SMR-fleet need through 2029 -> US dependent on Russia-controlled enrichment (energy analog of the China rare-earth chokepoint).
proven_results.parallel: TWO adversary chokepoints on one buildout: China (rare earths, independence ~2028) + Russia (enrichment, ~2028-29). Dollars cannot resolve either on the timeline.
